# Nectar.Pay

> Non-custodial crypto payment gateway for merchants. Accept BTC, TEXITcoin, and EVM stablecoins (USDC, USDT, PYUSD, DAI) direct to your own wallet — no custody, no per-transaction fees.

Nectar.Pay is part of the Honest Money ecosystem. Merchants paste a public key (xpub/zpub or EVM address); customers pay; funds land in the merchant's wallet without an intermediary.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Nectar.Pay is and how it works.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans — free tier, $19 unlimited, $99 advanced.
- [Manifesto](/manifesto): Why we built it and what we stand for.
- [Investors](/investors): Why you can't invest, and why TEXITcoin matters.
- [Integrations](/integrations): WooCommerce, SDK, and webhook tooling.
- [WooCommerce plugin](/integrations/woocommerce): Drop-in WooCommerce gateway.
- [Docs](/docs): Developer docs.
- [Wallet setup](/docs/wallet-setup): Connect a wallet to your store.
- [Compare](/compare): Nectar.Pay vs custodial gateways.
- [Cash out](/cash-out): How to convert crypto to local currency.
- [Where](/where): Live merchant heatmap.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.

## Optional

- [Start](/start): Mobile-friendly merchant onboarding.
- [Sign up](/signup): Full onboarding wizard.
